metadata.name: Bhima
metadata.primary_role: Second Pandava / Strongest warrior in the world / Son of Vayu / The mace champion
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Kuru Dynasty, Hastinapur, son of Kunti and Vayu)
metadata.divine_origin: Son of Vayu (Wind God) — inherits superhuman physical strength, the strength of ten thousand elephants

timelines.context_description: Bhima at his physical peak — the strongest warrior in the world, known for his enormous appetite, fierce protectiveness of his brothers, and his love of cooking.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Dark bronze-copper complexion, ruddy and glowing with immense vitality, skin stretched tight over massive muscles
physical_appearance.height: Enormous — the tallest and most physically imposing of all Pandavas, towers over everyone in any room, stands over 7 feet
physical_appearance.build: Absolutely massive — the most muscular human being in the epic, shoulders wider than doorframes, arms thicker than most men's legs, barrel chest, tree-trunk thighs, neck like a bull, waist surprisingly narrow for his size, hands that can crush iron, the body of a living siege engine
physical_appearance.facial_features: Broad fierce face with large intense dark eyes, wide strong jaw, thick bushy eyebrows perpetually set in determination or anger, broad flat nose, thick lips often curved in a fierce grin or a roaring battle face, ruggedly handsome in a massive primal way, thick curly beard
physical_appearance.hair: Thick wild curly black hair, barely contained by any crown, mane-like and unruly, matching his untamed nature
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: His sheer physical size is his mark — he literally fills rooms, his footsteps shake the ground, he eats enough for 50 men at every meal, his mace-fighting stance (legs wide, mace overhead) is iconic, his war roar is described as louder than thunder

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Heavy leather and bronze battle armor stretched over his massive frame, reinforced at the shoulders and chest, a deep crimson battle cloth, the armor dented from countless fights where he simply absorbed blows
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Thick gold armlets that look like normal bangles on his massive arms, a heavy gold chain across his vast chest, practical war bands, a crown that looks small on his enormous head
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A colossal iron mace (Gada) — his signature weapon, so heavy that no other warrior can even lift it, also devastating in unarmed combat — his fists are weapons of mass destruction, can uproot trees for improvised weapons

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Booming, thunderous, passionate, frequently roaring with laughter or rage, the most emotionally expressive of the Pandavas, speaks and the walls shake
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Deep rumbling bass — the deepest human voice in the epic, ground-shaking, chest-resonating, his whisper is louder than most men's shouts
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with passionate directness — no diplomacy, no subtlety, says exactly what he thinks, roars battle challenges, his threats are legendary ('I will drink Dushasana's blood!'), surprisingly tender when cooking for his family or speaking to his sons
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Volcanic protective fury, fierce love for family, enormous appetite for both food and battle, surprisingly tender underneath the ferocity

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Massive cinematic shot of Bhima, age 25, strongest warrior in the world. Dark bronze-copper skin, enormous 7-foot muscular frame. Broad fierce face with intense eyes, thick curly beard, wild unruly black hair. Wearing heavy bronze battle armor stretched over massive shoulders, crimson battle cloth. Holding a colossal iron mace overhead in one hand. Standing in a training arena, muscles defined, battle stance wide. 3D Pixar style, powerful dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A deep, thunderous rumbling bass voice. Ground-shaking, passionately direct. Roars with laughter or fury. His whisper is louder than most men's shouts. Age approximately 25 years.

timelines.context_description: Bhima at Kurukshetra systematically fulfilling his terrible vows — killing all 100 Kauravas, breaking Duryodhana's thigh, drinking Dushasana's blood after tearing him apart.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Battle-darkened bronze, blood-splattered (both his own and enemies'), skin burning hot with battle-fury and Vayu's power
physical_appearance.height: Even more terrifying on the battlefield — seems to grow larger with rage, a living mountain of destruction
physical_appearance.build: Peak destructive power — muscles engorged with battle-fury, veins visible across entire body, drenched in sweat and blood, moving with unstoppable momentum
physical_appearance.facial_features: A face of terrible wrathful fulfillment — bloodshot wild eyes, mouth open in perpetual battle roar, blood (of Dushasana) literally on his lips and face, the expression of righteous vengeance made flesh, magnificent and terrifying simultaneously
physical_appearance.hair: Wild blood-matted hair flying in all directions, any helmet or crown long since lost in the fury of combat
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: The most terrifying warrior on the field — enemy soldiers flee on sight, his mace-strikes create shockwaves, he systematically hunts and kills each Kaurava brother, the image of him tearing Dushasana apart and drinking his blood is the most shocking scene in the epic

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Battle-shattered armor barely hanging on his massive frame, most of it torn off, essentially bare-chested and blood-covered, a crimson waist-cloth soaked in battle
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: All jewelry lost or broken in combat, only the dented remains of his armlets, battle-scars exposed across his massive body
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: His enormous blood-slicked mace — now dented and gore-covered from killing 100 Kauravas, his bare hands that tore Dushasana apart, trees and chariot-wheels used as improvised clubs

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Roaring, terrifying, the voice of a cosmic force of vengeance — beyond human emotion, a living weapon of karma, interspersed with roars of triumph as he fulfills each vow
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Shattering bass that physically hurts eardrums — the roar of a hurricane given voice, his battle cry scatters armies
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Barely speaks in words anymore — mostly battle-roars, the systematic announcement of each Kaurava he kills ('97... 98... 99... DURYODHANA!'), his vow-fulfillment dialogue is delivered while blood-soaked and terrible
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Transcendent righteous fury, the terrifying satisfaction of vows fulfilled, a cosmic force of destruction that even his own allies find frightening

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Terrifying cinematic shot of Bhima at Kurukshetra, age 48. Blood-soaked massive bronze figure, wild bloodshot eyes, mouth open in devastating battle roar. Essentially bare-chested, blood-drenched, massive muscles engorged with fury. Swinging a gore-covered colossal mace with devastating force. Bodies and wreckage around him. Stormy battlefield, lightning, chaos. 3D Pixar style, terrifying dramatic lightning, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A shattering bass roar that physically scatters armies. Beyond human — a hurricane given voice. The terrifying sound of righteous vengeance. Age approximately 48 years.
